heroPoems.title: Instruction to Rise
heroPoems.firstStanza:
The first correction was embodied:
stand.

heroPoems.title: On Friendship
heroPoems.tagline: For when the street goes quiet.

heroPoems.title: Like a small stream
heroPoems.firstStanza:
Like a small stream
through mossy stone,
I keep going quietly
until I turn clear.

heroPoems.title: The Path of the Just
heroPoems.firstStanza:
Hear, my son, and accept my words,
and the years of your life will be many.
I have taught you the way of wisdom;
I have led you in straight paths.
heroPoems.tagline: For slow hours with a warm cup.

heroPoems.title: Rivers to the Sea
heroPoems.firstStanza:
The Way is nameless in its original simplicity.
Small, yet nothing can rule it.

heroPoems.title: Sonnets to Orpheus I, 1
heroPoems.firstStanza:
A tree rose there. O pure ascension.
O Orpheus sings. O tall tree in the ear.
And everything fell silent.
Yet in this silence new beginning, sign, and change appeared.

heroPoems.title: How Do I Love Thee?
heroPoems.firstStanza:
How do I love thee? Let me count the ways.
I love thee to the depth and breadth and height
My soul can reach, when feeling out of sight
For the ends of Being and ideal Grace.
I love thee to the level of everyday's
Most quiet need, by sun and candle-light.
heroPoems.tagline: For slow hours with a warm cup.

heroPoems.title: What you call clarity is often fear in clean clothes.
heroPoems.firstStanza:
What you call clarity is often fear in clean clothes.
I trust the fog more than certainty.
heroPoems.tagline: For when rain taps the window.

heroPoems.title: He ate and drank the precious words
heroPoems.firstStanza:
He ate and drank the precious words,
His spirit grew robust;
He knew no more that he was poor,
Nor that his frame was dust.

collections.name: The Shape of Lingering
collections.theme: A muted field of recollection, where detail carries the emotional weight.

featuredPoem.title: By the Rivers of Babylon
featuredPoem.firstLines:
By the rivers of Babylon,
there we sat and wept

poems.title: Deliverance is not for me in renunciation. I

collections.name: When Lamps Forget to Sleep
collections.tagline: For when shadows soften the room.
collections.theme: Poems that trace the distance between nearness and speech.

featuredPoem.title: Do the Work, Release the Claim
featuredPoem.firstLines:
You have authority over action,
never over the harvest.

poems.title: The morning sea of silence broke into ripples

collections.name: The Province of Faint Music
collections.theme: An atmosphere of low light, small rituals, and unhurried noticing.

featuredPoem.title: Suicide in the Trenches
featuredPoem.firstLines:
I knew a simple soldier boy
Who grinned at life in empty joy,

poems.title: The soul selects her own society
Burbank with a Baedeker: Bleistein with a Cigar
There's a certain slant of light
